title: adenosma hirsuta
intro: Adenosma hirsuta, also known as hairy Adenosma, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adenosma hirsuta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Adenosma hirsuta is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies such as powders and ointments.
